title: Loopress ACF object (REST)
description: GET/POST /loopress/v1/acf/{type}[/{key}] response shape: this is ACF's own acf_prepare_internal_post_type_for_export() output, an arbitrary shape this codebase only passes through (AcfService adds a top-level 'fields' array for field-groups). 'key' is the one field every ACF internal post type export guarantees, so it's the one thing worth pinning here; everything else is intentionally left open.
